creator: uqs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146049
Update xmbc to 13.2

This also makes all the Samba ports optional, so that you can still have a smbd installed on the same system as XBMC (the proper fix is to split up the samba port, but that's a different PR)

One problem with the patch remains: How do you get the langinfo.xml files for the newly added languages? It doesn't seem that they are being generated by the build tool, and they are not in the tarball either.
